---
title: "index-json"
editor: visual
execute: 
  echo: false
---

```{ojs}
jbs = FileAttachment("data-export/app_jobs.csv").csv()
```

```{ojs}
viewof jbst = Inputs.table(jbs, {required: false, multiple: false, required: false, value: jbs[0]})
```

```{ojs}
id = jbst.id_nodate
```

```{ojs}
sim_json = "data-export/app_sims/sims__" + id + ".json"
```

```{ojs}
x = fetch(sim_json)
    .then((response) => response.json())
```

```{ojs}
viewof xx = Inputs.table(x)
```
